title: King and Queen Fall Back
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Big Mom, Kaido as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AHAHA AAAIGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THE HOLY LAND - Mary GEOISE, RED LINE

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's as if this year's Reverie was cursed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should put what happened aside for now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Wano is the more pressing issue.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There was no way of knowing that the battle would go this far!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nice Robin must've been apprehended by now. It's time to act!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It wouldn't be out of place for someone to die un- expectedly...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: During a war that involves Kaido and big mom... this is our chance to erase that nuisance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The seas around Wano

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: All units standing by...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Uh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What's the matter?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Well... there's a giant shadow...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a great idea to make your own blog. I am glad you liked this web site. I am glad I have found this information.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What is it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: No idea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: An island?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's impossible!! That fruit is nothing but a legend now, even for us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It hasn't awakened for centuries!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How else do you explain the world government...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Giving a specific devil fruit a unique name?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They were hiding the fruit's true name...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Break next week.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...from the Annals of History?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What Does this Mean...?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
